title: Fixing Rude Sentences
learningGoal: The learner will successfully rewrite direct imperative statements into socially appropriate modal requests utilizing 'Could you' and appending 'Please'.
instructions: Oh no! A robot translated some Hindi sentences directly into English. It sounds very rude! 'Give me the menu.' 'Help me.' 'Open the window.' Your job is to rewrite these 3 sentences to make them polite. Start them with 'Could you' and end them with 'please'.

contentItems.text: CRITICAL RULE: Drop the command completely. Turn it into a question! 'Give me water' -> 'Could you give me water, please?'

writingPrompt: Rewrite these 3 rude sentences into polite questions: 1. Give me the menu. 2. Help me. 3. Open the window.
promptGoal: Test generation of modal softeners and pragmatic politeness markers to mitigate L1 transitive translation brutality.
referenceHints: Sentence 1: Could you [give me the menu], please?
Sentence 3: Could you [open the window], please?

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Could you give me the menu, please? Could you help me, please? Could you open the window, please?
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: कुड यू गिव मी द मेनू, प्लीज़? कुड यू हेल्प मी, प्लीज़? कुड यू ओपन द विंडो, प्लीज़?
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: क्या आप कृपया मुझे मेनू दे सकते हैं? क्या आप कृपया मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं? क्या आप कृपया खिड़की खोल सकते हैं?
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Perfect score. The learner successfully decoupled the imperative force and bracketed the requests with modal softeners and adverbs.

modelExampleOutputs.targetText: Please give me the menu. Please help me. Please open window.
modelExampleOutputs.transliteration: प्लीज़ गिव मी द मेनू। प्लीज़ हेल्प मी। प्लीज़ ओपन विंडो।
modelExampleOutputs.baseTranslation: कृपया मुझे मेनू दें। (विनम्र, लेकिन फिर भी आदेशात्मक)
modelExampleOutputs.annotation: Critical failure. They merely prepended 'Please' to the imperatives without fundamentally shifting the syntactic structure to a modal inquiry ('Could you').

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user definitively alter the sentence structure to begin with 'Could you'? (Penalize heavily for just prepending 'please' to the command).
Did the user append 'please' to the request?

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: Could you give me the menu, please? Could you help me, please? Could you open the window, please?
acceptableAlternates: Could you please give me the menu? Could you please help me? Could you please open the window?
adminCorrectAnswerSet.grammarBaseline: Zero tolerance for unmodified imperative structures. 'Please give me water' is a failure; it must be a modal question.

feedbackRules.onPass: Magnificent! You successfully destroyed the rude commands and rebuilt them into polite, gentlemanly questions!
feedbackRules.onFail: Please review your work. Did you just slap the word 'Please' onto the front of the order? In English, that is still an order! You must change the structure completely: 'Could you give me...'
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good start! Don't forget 'Could you'. It is the single most important polite phrase in the English language.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: Change these commands: Give me the menu. Help me. Open the window. Make them polite.

hintText: Frame every single request as a question! [Could you] + [Action] + [Please].
commonMistakes: Thinking that merely saying 'Please help me' is sufficient for a stranger.
